commands.review_summary:
The PR moves local-model lean browser, cron, and message cuts into OpenClaw/plugin tool construction and adds focused regression coverage for those construction-time options.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +46. Total +69 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main filters local-model lean tools after construction, so the browser/message/cron factories and plugin discovery path can still be reached before removal. I did not run a live Windows local-model reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the maintainer-owned PR has no concrete blocking finding from this review.

target.title: fix(agents): avoid constructing lean local model tools
target.body:
## Summary
- push `localModelLean` cuts into tool construction instead of only filtering after the surface is built
- skip message and cron construction when lean local-model mode is active
- add lean denylist coverage so browser/message/cron stay out of plugin resolution and inherited subagent deny policy

## Verification
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools-agent-config.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.update-plan.test.ts --reporter=dot` — 6 files, 188 tests passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` — clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- Crabbox/AWS `check:changed`: provider=aws, lease=cbx_6c273098ca05, run=run_7f5548f1e20e, exit=0

Related: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599
target.author: vincentkoc
